ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Parte quarta. Volume primo, contenente le lettere
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Strozzi comments on Varchi as censor of the Infiammati, and on his own partecipation to the Academy.

Essay.EssayTitle: A messer Benedetto Varchi. Di Roma a` 5 di Novembre nel 40.

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
